changes.description: Weekly gold progress handles difficulty mismatch losses correctly.
changes.details: Gold lost to a difficulty mismatch now counts as resolved progress instead of remaining gold. Fully cleared rosters with mismatch losses now show 100% complete and 0 gold remaining while still showing the lost gold warning.

changes.description: Application icon scaling improved.
changes.details: The generated LOA Tracker application icon assets were refreshed from the updated app icon source so the icon appears cleaner at packaged Windows icon sizes.

changes.description: MeowConnect difficulty filters added to Raid Together.
changes.details: Raid Together now has per-raid difficulty chips for Normal, Hard, and Nightmare where available. Clicking an active chip clears that raid filter and returns it to all difficulties.

changes.description: MeowConnect Raid Together header is more compact.
changes.details: The MeowConnect title, centered raid difficulty filters, and friends count now share one tighter header so the raid comparison area keeps more vertical space.

changes.description: MeowConnect profile details show richer character stats.
changes.details: Expanded friend profiles now show class beside the character name, the gold-earner icon beside the title, aligned iLvl and CP values, and dashboard-matched CP coloring.

changes.description: Static reservations are clearer in MeowConnect.
changes.details: Static rows now distinguish shared static runs from generic static reservations. Static runs shared with you count as available for your matching, while unrelated static reservations stay unavailable.

changes.description: Static badges added to expanded MeowConnect profiles.
changes.details: Characters reserved for static now show the same Static badge style used on dashboard raid labels, including cleared static rows.

changes.description: Expanded MeowConnect profile labels are less noisy.
changes.details: Static run counts were removed from collapsed and expanded profile headers, while available and cleared counts remain visible. The profile ilvl label now follows the active difficulty filter and defaults to the raid lowest non-solo requirement.

changes.description: Dashboard and app headers use space more efficiently.
changes.details: The universal app header, dashboard stat labels, weekly progress spacing, and dashboard view controls were tightened to reduce dead space.

changes.description: Dashboard view selection moved to System settings.
changes.details: The List/Cards dashboard view preference now lives in General System settings instead of taking space inside the dashboard header.

changes.description: Update history link moved into the Updates header.
changes.details: The Read previous changelogs link now appears as a note in the Updates & Changelog header instead of floating at the bottom of the page.

changes.description: MeowConnect clear status respects actual raid clears.
changes.details: Difficulty filters now only affect availability by item level. Clear status and labels use the actual completion or encounter snapshot evidence so Normal clears do not become Hard clears, and already-cleared characters no longer appear available.

changes.description: Local encounter snapshots match the active character more reliably.
changes.details: LOA Logs encounter snapshots now include the local player when matching character IDs, so local clears are recognized even when the player list is incomplete.

changes.description: Raid clear gate counting handles final-gate clears.
changes.details: Encounter evidence such as Gate 2 on a two-gate raid now counts as clearing through that gate instead of only counting one arbitrary gate entry.

changes.description: MeowConnect text encoding artifacts removed.
changes.details: Corrupted characters in profile separators, close buttons, and favorite icons were cleaned up.

changes.description: MeowConnect difficulty chip state updates immediately.
changes.details: Difficulty chips now react instantly per raid and no longer share visual state with other raid filters.

changes.description: LOAtracker header image now scales without clipping.
changes.details: The app header now uses the cleaner LOAtracker header image with tighter sizing and corrected right-side fit.

changes.description: README now displays the app icon beside the project title.
changes.details: The GitHub README header now renders the LOAtracker icon inline next to MeowGang Tracker and the README version badge was updated to 1.2.2.

changes.description: Application version metadata updated for 1.2.2.
changes.details: package.json, package-lock.json, tauri.conf.json, and the generated Rust app version now point at 1.2.2.

changes.description: Application icons regenerated from the newer LOAtracker artwork.
changes.details: Windows, macOS, iOS, Android, store, and bundled Tauri icon assets were refreshed, and new static LOAtracker header/app icon assets were added for the app and README.

changes.description: Sidebar navigation now uses branded image icons.
changes.details: Dashboard, To Do, Marketplace, Settings, Updates, and MeowConnect navigation now use image assets instead of emoji-style icons, with larger icon sizing and cleaner footer spacing.

changes.description: Progression navigation now focuses on Marketplace.
changes.details: The Progression Planner sidebar entry was renamed Marketplace, planner sub-tabs were removed, and the progression view now opens directly into Market Prices.

changes.description: Market Prices hides the unfinished Gems category.
changes.details: The Gems sub-tab was removed from Market Prices and any stale gems category selection is redirected back to Engraving.

changes.description: Dashboard character cards support quick completion actions.
changes.details: Dashboard daily, weekly, and raid-gate labels can now be clicked to mark progress complete, right-clicked to undo, and still expose character-name navigation to the To Do view.

changes.description: Roster settings toggles use clearer visual states.
changes.details: Dashboard visibility and MeowConnect sharing toggles now use visibility and MeowConnect icons, clearer Connected/Visible labels, and more specific tooltips.

changes.description: To Do character highlighting is smoother and more reliable.
changes.details: To Do now centers highlighted characters in the matrix, handles RAT split-view routing when the highlighted character lives in the RAT view, and clears highlights with a managed timer.

changes.description: To Do split RAT view handles empty roster states.
changes.details: Empty roster views now show specific messages for separated RAT characters, missing RAT characters, and normal empty rosters instead of falling through to a generic empty state.

changes.description: Machinist class mapping corrected.
changes.details: The Scouter/Machinist class data now uses the scouter class id with the Machinist display name and the existing class icon.
